mapper.select: SELECT store_id AS storeId, member_id AS memberId, store_name AS storeName, store_address AS storeAddress, store_phone AS storePhone, store_intro AS storeIntro, store_owner AS storeOwner, store_owner_address AS storeOwnerAddress, store_origin_info AS storeOriginInfo, store_owner_no AS storeOwnerNo, store_category AS storeCategory, store_rating AS storeRating, latitude AS LATITUDE, longitude AS LONGITUDE, store_thumb AS storeThumb FROM STORE_TBL WHERE store_id = #{storeId}

SELECT menu_id, store_id, menu_name, menu_carbon, menu_price, menu_category, menu_image, menu_info FROM MENU_TBL WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND menu_status = 1 ORDER BY menu_category ASC, menu_id ASC

SELECT o.option_no, o.option_type, o.option_name, o.option_price FROM OPTION_TBL o JOIN MENU_OPTION_MAP mom ON o.option_no = mom.option_no WHERE mom.menu_id = #{menuId} ORDER BY o.option_type ASC, o.option_no ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT order_seq.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO order_tbl ( order_id, member_id, store_id, used_point, get_point, order_status, delivery_type ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{memberId}, #{storeId}, #{usedPoint}, #{getPoint}, 0, #{deliveryType} )

INSERT INTO order_detail ( order_detail_id, order_id, menu_id, price, option_string, total_carbon, quantity ) SELECT ORDER_DETAIL_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{orderId}, m.menu_id, #{orderItem.price}, #{orderItem.optionString, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, m.menu_carbon, #{orderItem.quantity} FROM menu_tbl m WHERE m.menu_id = #{orderItem.menuId}
mapper.select: SELECT od.menu_id AS menuId, m.menu_name AS menuName, od.quantity, od.price, od.option_string AS optionString FROM order_detail od JOIN menu_tbl m ON od.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE od.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY od.order_detail_id

SELECT s.store_name AS storeName, o.order_id AS orderId, o.used_point AS usedPoint, o.get_point AS getPoint, CASE WHEN o.delivery_type = 1 THEN 0 WHEN o.delivery_type = 2 THEN 1000 ELSE 2000 END AS deliveryPrice, o.delivery_type AS deliveryType, o.order_status AS orderStatus FROM order_tbl o JOIN store_tbl s ON o.store_id = s.store_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT s.store_name AS storeName, o.order_id AS orderId, o.used_point AS usedPoint, o.get_point AS getPoint, CASE WHEN o.delivery_type = 1 THEN 0 WHEN o.delivery_type = 2 THEN 1000 ELSE 2000 END AS deliveryPrice, o.delivery_type AS deliveryType, o.order_status AS orderStatus, TO_CHAR(olm.reg_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS orderDate,
od_sum.totalCount AS totalCount, md.menu_name AS menuName, md.menu_image AS menuImage, od_first.option_string AS optionString,
s.store_address AS storeAddress, m.member_addr AS deliveryAddress
FROM order_tbl o
JOIN store_tbl s ON o.store_id = s.store_id
JOIN order_list_map olm ON o.order_id = olm.order_id
JOIN member_tbl m ON o.member_id = m.member_id
JOIN ( SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity) AS totalCount FROM order_detail GROUP BY order_id ) od_sum ON o.order_id = od_sum.order_id
JOIN ( SELECT od1.* FROM order_detail od1 JOIN ( SELECT order_id, MIN(order_detail_id) AS min_detail_id FROM order_detail GROUP BY order_id ) x ON od1.order_id = x.order_id AND od1.order_detail_id = x.min_detail_id ) od_first ON o.order_id = od_first.order_id
JOIN menu_tbl md ON od_first.menu_id = md.menu_id
WHERE o.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY o.order_id DESC
